title: research_Introduction
text:
[VISUAL CONTENT - Page 1]
This page is the cover of "The Gas Turbine Handbook."

1.  **Mathematical Equations:** None evident on the cover page.
2.  **Graphs and Charts:** None evident on the cover page.
3.  **Tables:** None evident on the cover page.
4.  **Diagrams and Schematics:** There are schematic-like drawings in the background of a gas turbine intake assembly. The images include parts like the rear intake casing, rear air intake and lattice support, rear air screen, front intake casing, restrictor jet, and a drain to atmosphere

title: research_Introduction
text:
[VISUAL CONTENT - Page 2]
This page from the "NETL Turbine Handbook" is mostly introductory text describing the development and purpose of the handbook. There are no mathematical equations, graphs, charts, tables, diagrams, or schematics on the page.

title: research_Introduction
text:
[VISUAL CONTENT - Page 3]
This page contains only text and contact information for Richard Dennis, Turbine Technology Manager at the National Energy Technology Laboratory (NETL). There are no equations, graphs, charts, tables, or diagrams related to combustion engineering on this page.
